channel.title: Maciej Skuratowski

item.title: Hello World
item.description: My name is Maciej Skuratowski. I would like to say hello to all of you and welcome to my blog.

item.title: About
item.description: Bio I am a Microsoft Certified Professional and Full Stack Developer with 6+ years of experience. I have consulted for many clients, providing guidance on various software projects. These days I work mainly with Microsoft Azure and Web Development (ASP.NET Core and Angular 2+, VueJs), architecting solutions around PaaS, Azure Functions, App Service, Azure Cosmos DB, IoT and many other Azure services. I am big fan of clean & scalable architectures, micro-services, cloud infrastructure, and innovative edge technologies and best practices during engineer works.
